title: Implement forwarding buffer with backpressure (Rust)
description:
Add per-source forwarding buffer to Rust stack (lichen-node or lichen-core):
- Track packets per source IID (MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES=8, MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE=2)
- Return QueueFull error when limit exceeded
- Send NACK upstream when full (spec appendix-bufferbloat.md)
close_reason: Implemented ForwardBuffer in rust/lichen-node/src/forward_buffer.rs: per-source tracking with MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES=8, MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE=2; ForwardError::QueueFull returned when limit exceeded; integrated into Stack with queue_forward(), transmit_forward(), forward_stats() methods; 13 tests pass
